title: Remember last-used URL in session
description: Store last-used URL so subsequent commands don't need to repeat it. gc comments URL; gc reply 0 done (uses remembered URL).
close_reason: Added LastURLManager; gc comments saves URL, gc reply uses it automatically

title: Add gc examples command
description: Show common usage patterns and examples. Help LLMs understand typical workflows.
close_reason: Added gc examples command with workflows: quick, staging, series, reviewers

title: Add watch/unwatch support
description: Cannot subscribe/unsubscribe from issues. Add 'jira issue watch' and 'jira issue unwatch' commands.
close_reason: Added watch, unwatch, and watchers commands to jira tool

title: Add --fields flag for field selection
description: Add --fields flag to select only specific fields in output. Reduces token usage for LLMs. Example: gc comments URL --fields=thread_index,file,message
close_reason: Implemented --fields flag for comments and series-comments commands

title: Add gc explain command
description: Detailed usage with examples for a specific command. gc explain add-reviewer would show full usage, examples, and common patterns.
close_reason: Implemented gc explain command with detailed docs for all commands

title: Wire up missing extract, reply, and batch commands
description: The parsers for extract, reply, and batch commands exist in parsers.py but are not wired up in setup_parsers(). The docstring references these commands but they're not available. Need to add them to setup_parsers() and the handlers dict.
close_reason: Added extract, reply, and batch handlers to handlers dict in cli.py and wired up parsers in setup_parsers()

title: Add aliases for common operations
description: Short aliases like gc done 0 for gc reply --done URL 0. Other candidates: gc ack, gc wip, etc.
close_reason: Implemented done and ack shortcut commands

title: Add --output flag for field selection
description: Add pipe-friendly output mode, e.g. 'jira issue get LU-19839 --output key' to just print the key. Useful for scripting and chaining commands.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix credential loading - don't require CWD .env
description: The gerrit-comments client requires sourcing .env from CWD which is inconvenient. Should load from ~/.config/gerrit-comments/.env or similar standard location automatically.
close_reason: Fixed credential loading: CWD .env now checked first, removed hardcoded defaults, added clear error when credentials missing

title: Add worklog support
description: Cannot view or add time tracking entries. Add 'jira issue worklogs' to view and 'jira issue worklog' to add time entries.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add reviewer management with fuzzy name matching
description: Add commands to manage reviewers on Gerrit changes. Support fuzzy matching on names so users can type partial/imperfect names and still find the right person. Commands: add-reviewer, remove-reviewer, list-reviewers, find-reviewer (for lookup).
close_reason: Added reviewers, add-reviewer, remove-reviewer, and find-user commands with fuzzy name matching. Multiple match handling shows candidates and asks for more specificity.

title: Add short alias 'gc' for gerrit-comments CLI
description: The command name 'gerrit-comments' is quite long to type repeatedly. Add a shorter alias 'gc' in the install script entry points for faster command entry.
close_reason: Added gc entry point in pyproject.toml as alias for gerrit-comments

title: Review gerrit tool ergonomics and queue improvements
close_reason: Review complete - found missing commands and ergonomic issues

title: Add issue update command
description: Cannot update issue fields like assignee, priority, labels, or description. Only create and transition are supported. This is a significant gap for workflow automation.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add --dry-run to all mutating commands
description: Show what a command would do without executing. Useful for verification before making changes.
close_reason: Implemented --dry-run flag for all mutating commands: reply, batch, review --post-comments, add-reviewer, remove-reviewer

title: Add issue link/relation support
description: Cannot view or create issue links (blocks, relates to, duplicates, etc). Add 'jira issue links' to view and 'jira issue link' to create relationships.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add --summary mode for truncated output
description: Truncate long content (diffs, code context) to first N lines with '... N more lines' indicator. Reduces tokens when just need the gist. IMPORTANT: Output should include hint like 'Use without --summary to see full content' to discourage agents from always using truncated mode and missing important details.
close_reason: Implemented --summary flag for comments, review, and series-comments commands

title: Add URL parsing for issue keys
description: Tool should accept full JIRA URLs like https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-19839 and extract the issue key automatically, in addition to accepting bare keys.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add retry logic for transient API failures
description: Automatically retry on transient failures (5xx, timeouts, connection errors). Configurable max retries and backoff.
close_reason: Implemented retry logic with exponential backoff for transient API failures (5xx, 429, timeouts, connection errors)

title: Rename extract command to comments
description: The 'extract' command name is unclear - it extracts comments from a Gerrit change. Rename to 'comments' and keep 'extract' as a deprecated alias for backwards compatibility.
close_reason: Renamed extract to comments with extract as backwards-compatible alias. Updated docstring examples to use gc.

title: Add attachment upload
description: Can download attachments but not upload them. Add 'jira attachment upload' command.
close_reason: Closed

title: Accept change numbers directly (not just URLs)
description: Allow gc comments 12345 instead of requiring full URL. Use configured GERRIT_URL as base.
close_reason: Feature already implemented and merged to main

title: Fix comment ordering - oldest first by default
description: get_comments defaults to -created (newest first), but when reading a conversation you want oldest first to follow the thread chronologically. Should default to oldest-first or add --chronological flag.
close_reason: Closed
